name: HandlerProc
prototype: DWORD __stdcall(DWORD dwControl, DWORD dwEventType, LPVOID lpEventData, LPVOID lpContext)

name: WinMain
prototype: int __stdcall(HINSTANCE hInstance, HINSTANCE hPrevInstance, LPSTR lpCmdLine, int nShowCmd)

name: swprintf
prototype: int(wchar_t *const Buffer, const size_t BufferCount, const wchar_t *const Format, ...)
